cases.title: OrganizerStaff performs check-in on assigned event
preconditions: Event InProgress with active check-in window and Registered participant
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff Authorization bearer and target registrationId
Verify check-in persisted for the registration
cases.expected: HTTP 200; check-in recorded with timestamp; staff operates within assigned event scope per FR-27 and Check in participant Yes (assigned events) per permission matrix

cases.title: OrganizerStaff views paginated registrations list on assigned event
preconditions: Event with multiple participant registrations exceeding one page
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with staff Authorization bearer
Verify paginated envelope contains items, page, pageSize, total, totalPages
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated envelope; operational registrations list returned for assigned event only; total reflects full row count before paging per FR-30 and FR-31

cases.title: OrganizerStaff views waitlist and attendance lists on assigned event
preconditions: Event at capacity with waitlist entries and at least one check-in record
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned to eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/waitlist?page=1&pageSize=20 with staff token
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/attendance?page=1&pageSize=20 with staff token
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 200 paginated envelopes; staff can read operational waitlist and attendance data within assigned event scope

cases.title: OrganizerStaff views event dashboard on assigned event
preconditions: Published event with operational activity (registrations, check-ins)
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with staff Authorization bearer
Inspect summary fields for registrations and check-ins
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with event overview metrics; staff can monitor assigned event operations within authorized scope

cases.title: OrganizerStaff retrieves status history on assigned event per testing-plan §3
preconditions: Event with at least one registration status transition
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned to the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/status-history?page=1&pageSize=10 with staff Authorization bearer token
Verify transitions are traceable in returned items
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated status history items; testing-plan §3 Status history retrieval row satisfied within assigned event scope; staff traceability read permitted per limited audit read rules

cases.title: OrganizerStaff views eligibility list on assigned event
preconditions: Completed event with evaluated eligibility for participants
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 with staff Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with paginated eligibility items including result and reason fields; staff reads eligibility within assigned event scope per GET /events/{eventId}/eligibility admin/staff-scope contract

cases.title: OrganizerStaff exports operational data on assigned event
preconditions: Event with exportable operational data
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds including eventId
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/export with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with export payload; scoped staff export permitted on assigned event per permission matrix Export reports Scoped/optional

cases.title: assertEventScope permits OrganizerStaff for assigned eventId at module boundary
preconditions: JwtPayload role OrganizerStaff with assignedEventIds containing target eventId
Valid eventId UUID for an assigned event in seeded Postgres fixture
steps: Call assertEventScope(staffActor, assignedEventId) against scope module with real actor context
Confirm no domain handler is invoked when scope passes
cases.expected: No exception thrown; scope module returns without error; OrganizerStaff may operate on assigned events per scope constraints section 3

cases.title: Event scope check runs before domain mutation on staff commands
preconditions: Protected staff command handler wired with authorization decision pattern (authenticate, role, scope, guard, execute)
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to event B attempting mutation on event A
Real Postgres transaction boundary for check-in handler
steps: Invoke staff check-in handler with staff token targeting unassigned eventId registration
Query checkin_records table for event A registration
Confirm handler short-circuits at event scope step before state-transition validators
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 returned before domain transaction commits; no CheckinRecord row inserted; satisfies NFR-08 authorization by role and event scope step 3

cases.title: Cross-event staff check-in classified as P0 unauthorized critical update
preconditions: Event A InProgress with Registered participant and active check-in window
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned only to event B
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventAId}/checkins with staff token and valid registrationId on event A
Verify event A registration state unchanged
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404; no CheckinRecord created on event A; classified P0 defect if check-in succeeded per testing plan defect severity model unauthorized critical update

cases.title: Out-of-scope staff denial uses typed error without leaking other event data
preconditions: OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to event B only
Known event A with operational registrations not assigned to staff actor
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventAId}/registrations with staff Authorization bearer
Parse JSON error body
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 with error.code FORBIDDEN or not-found equivalent, user-safe message, and requestId; response does not include event A participant PII or registration details; immediate fail feedback per NFR-13

cases.title: assertEventScope rejects OrganizerStaff for unassigned event
preconditions: JwtPayload role OrganizerStaff with assignedEventIds not containing target eventId
Valid eventId UUID for another event
steps: Call assertEventScope(staffActor, unassignedEventId)
cases.expected: ApiError thrown with code FORBIDDEN and statusCode 403; staff limited to assigned events per scope constraints section 3

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied registrations list on unassigned event
preconditions: Event with registrations that staff actor is not assigned to
OrganizerStaff JWT without eventId in assignedEventIds
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/registrations?page=1&pageSize=20 with staff Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 FORBIDDEN or HTTP 404 when entity not in actor scope per API error mapping; no cross-event registration data returned; FR-27 assigned event scope enforced

cases.title: OrganizerStaff outside assigned event scope cannot check in participant
preconditions: Event A InProgress with active check-in window and Registered participant
OrganizerStaff JWT assigned only to a different event B, not event A
Fresh Idempotency-Key header value
steps: POST /api/v1/events/{eventAId}/checkins with staff JWT scoped to event B only and valid registrationId on event A
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per authorization decision pattern; no CheckinRecord created; registration on event A unchanged; scope constraint FR-27 enforced

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied dashboard for unassigned event
preconditions: Event with operational dashboard data not assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to a different event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/dashboard with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope-hiding policy; no cross-event operational metrics leakage

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot export data for out-of-scope event
preconditions: Event with operational data not assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to a different event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/export with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope-hiding policy; no cross-event operational data leakage via export

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot retrieve status history for out-of-scope event
preconditions: Event with status history entries not assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to a different event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/status-history with staff Authorization bearer token
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per scope-hiding policy; status history not exposed outside assigned event scope

cases.title: OrganizerStaff cannot view eligibility list for out-of-scope event
preconditions: Completed event with eligibility data not assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to a different event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/eligibility?page=1&pageSize=20 with staff Authorization bearer
cases.expected: HTTP 403 or 404 per assertEventScope; no cross-event eligibility participant data leakage

cases.title: OrganizerStaff with empty assignedEventIds denied all event-scoped operational endpoints
preconditions: Published event with registrations and check-in window
OrganizerStaff JWT with assignedEventIds empty array
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/registrations with staff token
POST /api/v1/events/{eventId}/checkins with staff token and valid registrationId
GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with staff token
cases.expected: Each request returns HTTP 403 or 404; staff with no assignments cannot operate on any event; FR-27 boundary enforced for empty assignment set

cases.title: OrganizerStaff denied waitlist and attendance lists on unassigned event
preconditions: Event with waitlist entries and attendance records not assigned to staff actor
OrganizerStaff JWT scoped to a different event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/waitlist with staff token
GET /api/v1/events/{unassignedEventId}/attendance with staff token
cases.expected: Both requests return HTTP 403 or 404; staff cannot browse operational waitlist or attendance data outside assigned event scope

cases.title: OrganizerStaff UI check-in console limited to assigned events only
preconditions: Web app running with role-aware route guards and event scope enforcement
Browser authenticated as OrganizerStaff with assignedEventIds containing event A only
Seed data includes event B not assigned to staff actor
steps: Navigate to organizer event list or shell
Attempt to open check-in console for unassigned event B via direct URL
Open check-in console for assigned event A
cases.expected: Assigned event A check-in console renders and accepts staff actions; unassigned event B route shows access denied or redirect; UI enforces staff can only operate within assigned event scope per route guards

cases.title: OrganizerStaff operational list pages only surface assigned events
preconditions: OrganizerStaff assigned to event A but not event B
Both events have registrations visible to admin
Browser session authenticated as OrganizerStaff
steps: Navigate to organizer staff assigned events list
Confirm event B is absent from navigable event links
Open registrations operational table for assigned event A and verify rows render
Attempt direct navigation to event B registrations URL
cases.expected: Assigned event A operational pages load with paginated table rows; event B is not listed and direct URL shows access denied or redirect; FR-27 staff event scope enforced in UI journey
